nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Canonical always-on agent rules read by Claude Code and Cursor: defines what EdPath is, the non-negotiable workflow constraints, the tech stack, and a doc map routing each task to the single relevant reference doc.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Thin Claude Code entry document that imports AGENTS.md as the single source of agent rules, reserving this file only for Claude-specific guidance that does not belong in the shared rules.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Primary project README documenting EdPath end to end: product flow, tech stack, system and LangGraph agent architecture, setup, local run instructions, environment variables, persistence, and evals.

nodes.name: langgraph.json
nodes.summary: LangGraph CLI registration config that declares the 'edpath-agent' graph, pointing to the compiled graph export in the backend and wiring in the backend .env file.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Root monorepo manifest defining npm workspaces (apps/*, packages/*), Turbo-driven build/dev/lint/test scripts, the LangGraph dev command, and shared dev dependencies like Turbo, TypeScript, and Prettier.

nodes.name: turbo.json
nodes.summary: Turborepo pipeline configuration defining the task graph and caching for build, lint, check-types, test, and dev across the monorepo workspaces.
